text:
pub fn spawn_pinned<F, Fut>(&self, create_task: F) -> JoinHandle<Fut::Output>
    where
        F: FnOnce() -> Fut,
        F: Send + 'static,
        Fut: Future + 'static,
        Fut::Output: Send + 'static,
    {
        self.pool
            .spawn_pinned(create_task, WorkerChoice::LeastBurdened)
    }
